scenarios.name: answers stay sealed from other members until the round closes, then release; one answer per member

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_question_of_the_day__rounds (id, question, question_date, reveal_at, status, source, visibility, created_by, created_at) VALUES (?, 'What made you laugh today?', '2099-01-01', '2099-01-01T23:59:59Z', 'open', 'deck', 'everyone', ?, '2099-01-01T08:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_question_of_the_day__answers (id, round_id, member_id, answer_text, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'the cat', '2099-01-01T09:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_question_of_the_day__answers (id, round_id, member_id, answer_text, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'second answer', '2099-01-01T09:05:00Z')
UPDATE app_question_of_the_day__rounds SET status='closed' WHERE id = ?
UPDATE app_question_of_the_day__answers SET answer_text='edited after close' WHERE id = ?
SELECT id, answer_text FROM app_question_of_the_day__answers WHERE id = ?
